name: Pot Roast#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roast in the crockpot.
2. Place mushrooms on top of the meat.
3. Mix the beef broth with the onion soup mix and pour over everything.
4. Cover and cook for 10-12 hours on low or 5-6 hours on high.
5. Optional: Add desired vegetables about halfway through cooking time.
